decisions.decision: Content-based SHA256 hashing voor duplicate detection (status wijzigingen creëren geen nieuwe cards)
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Sub-agent tasks creëren cards in "In Progress" column
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Combine-based real-time updates via existing `@Published` pattern
decisions.author: architect-morty

decisions.decision: Used KanbanManager as a facade pattern to simplify lifecycle management
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Hover-based "Claim" button UX (only shows when hovering auto-generated cards)
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Card details in modal sheet instead of inline editing (simpler UX for MVP)
decisions.author: frontend-morty

decisions.decision: Statistics in footer for constant visibility without taking vertical space
decisions.author: frontend-morty
